# Whispering Earring

**[STUB]** Source is the Vakuu page and live event text; verify with a dedicated wiki page if one appears.

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Rarity | Ancient |
| Class | Any |

## Description

Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. Vakuu plays your first turn for you.

## Notes

### Obtaining Whispering Earring

Can be offered at the start of Act 3 by Vakuu.

## Strategy Notes
